---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

The problem or limitation you are running into. What are you trying to do that
Tamlil does not yet support?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. Sketch the behavior, not necessarily the
implementation.

## Which part

- [ ] Menu bar app (`Tamlil/`)
- [ ] Python pipeline / CLI (`tamlil-*`)
- [ ] MCP server (`tamlil-mcp`)
- [ ] Docs / build tooling

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps: related issues, links, or examples.
